reason: The remediation script performs a filesystem-wide ownership change of all world-writable directories to root. While fixing a security issue, this broad change can unintentionally alter ownership of directories required by specific services (e.g., web servers, application runtimes) and may cause service failures. Human verification of each affected directory is needed before applying the fix.
estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Potential service disruption due to ownership changes; Unintended impact on applications that rely on non-root ownership; Large-scale file system operation may miss critical exclusions
